data.title: FERRARI N.V.: PERIODIC REPORT ON THE BUYBACK PROGRAM
data.description: Ferrari N.V. has announced the purchase of Euro 250 million worth of common shares as part of a larger share buyback program totaling approximately Euro 3.5 billion planned to be completed by 2030. This initial tranche of the buyback program was disclosed during the 2025 Capital Markets Day. The shares were acquired on both the Euronext Milan (EXM) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). The company aims to continue this multi-year buyback program until 2030.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up On Iran News; Powell Due As Software, Miners Shine (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced an increase on Monday in response to the recent U.S.-Iran conflict updates. Federal Reserve Chair Powell is scheduled to address the market shortly after opening. Today's stock market saw notable improvements with the Dow rising, while software and mining sectors showed strong performance.

data.title: Integrative Ear, Nose & Throat Expands to Lindenhurst, Bringing Advanced, Minimally Invasive ENT Care to South Shore Long Island
data.description: Dr. Michael S. Cohen's practice, Integrative Ear Nose & Throat, is set to inaugurate its third location in Lindenhurst, NY, at 100 E. Sunrise Highway on Long Island. This expansion is a strategic move to provide specialized holistic ENT care to a broader population across Nassau and Suffolk County.

data.title: Philatron Wire & Cable Advancing Next-Generation Charging Infrastructure for Fleet and Public EV Networks at ACT Expo May 4-7, 2026
data.description: In Las Vegas on March 30, 2026, a renowned U.S. manufacturer called Philatron Wire and Cable is set to present cutting-edge electric vehicle (EV) charging cable innovations at the Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo 2026. This event will provide a platform for industry advancements and product displays, highlighting the company's state-of-the-art solutions to address the evolving demands of the EV market.
